hooks.command: $d = 'C:\Users\Marcel\Desktop\Projetos Claude\acoes-2025'; Set-Location $d; $s = git -c http.sslVerify=false status --porcelain; if ($s) { git -c http.sslVerify=false add -A; git -c http.sslVerify=false commit -m "auto: update $(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')"; git -c http.sslVerify=false push origin master } 2>$null
